title: Mellow Spanish Chinese Cabbage Stir Fry
description: A plant-based friendly Spanish dish featuring Chinese cabbage, cooked to perfection in a bamboo steamer and stir fried with a blend of spices, this recipe is a cultural fusion of Spanish and Chinese cuisine, providing a comforting and springy meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped Chinese cabbage and cook for 2 minutes until it starts to wilt.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the lemon juice and stir to combine.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes until the cabbage is tender.
Transfer the mixture to a bamboo steamer and steam for 5 minutes until the flavors have melded together.
Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with additional cherry tomatoes if desired.
